privileged_info_for_vlm: The Northwind database contains 609,283 Order Details rows. Ground truth for the first digit of the Line Total (UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount)): Digit 1 has 169,292 occurrences (proportion ~0.2779), and Digit 9 has 31,678 occurrences (proportion ~0.052). Benford's expected proportions are approximately: 1=0.301, 2=0.176, 3=0.125, 4=0.097, 5=0.079, 6=0.067, 7=0.058, 8=0.051, 9=0.046.
